title: dendromecon harfordii var. harfordii
intro: Dendromecon harfordii var. harfordii, also known as the bush poppy or California bush poppy, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Baja California, Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The health benefits of Dendromecon harfordii var. harfordii are said to include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional folk medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
